CustomField.formula: IF(AND(sugati__A_Total_Bookings__c = 0,sugati__A_Total_Quotes__c = 0), "Lead", IF(AND(sugati__A_Total_Bookings__c = 0,sugati__A_Total_Quotes__c > 0), "Potential Client", IF(sugati__A_Total_Bookings__c = 1, "Client", IF(sugati__A_Total_Bookings__c > 1, "Repeat Client", null ))))
CustomField.label: Status
